summary: Completed testing of AI video service with 9 formats including 3 new ones. All new format functionality working correctly.

performance_issues.issue: API response time extremely slow (30+ seconds)
performance_issues.impact: Frontend shows 'no formats found' initially until API responds

passed_tests: Backend /api/formats returns all 9 video formats including new ones (gameplay_clip, ai_story, character_explainer)
Backend returns 6 character types for character_explainer format
Backend returns 6 gameplay types for gameplay_clip format
Format selector modal displays all 9 format cards correctly
Selecting 'Геймплей + Клип' shows YouTube URL input and 6 gameplay selector options
Selecting 'Персонаж-объяснитель' shows character selector with 6 characters (kitten, puppy, skeleton, robot, alien, bear)
Selecting 'AI История' shows story-specific hints (страшная, романтическая, приключенческая, мистическая)
Quick hints change correctly based on selected format
Placeholder text changes dynamically for each format
Generate button becomes clickable when prompt is filled for new formats
action_item_for_main_agent: Optimize backend API response times - /api/formats endpoint takes 30+ seconds to respond, causing poor user experience with empty format selector initially
success_percentage: Backend: 85% (API works but slow), Frontend: 100% (all dynamic fields and format selection working perfectly)
